hero_headline: Your ceiling isn't time. It's undocumented process.
hero_subtext: You figured out how to get clients. You figured out how to deliver great work. But you never designed how your business actually runs. That's why you hit 3–5 clients and stall — not because you lack skill, but because your business relies entirely on you.
callout_headline: It's midnight on a Tuesday. You're on your 4th cup of coffee. Client A still hasn't sent the logo. Client B thinks you're tech support.
callout_text: Your spouse calls it your "little hobby." You haven't been present at your kid's last three games. And you keep telling yourself: "After this launch, things will slow down." But they never do. Sound familiar? The problem isn't that you need to work harder — or even hire. The problem is your business has no infrastructure. Every client feels custom. Every task lives in your head. You accidentally built yourself into the bottleneck.
cta_banner_headline: Ready to stop being the bottleneck?
cta_banner_text: Whether you need a strategy to find your next 10 clients or a system that lets you stop working until midnight — we've got you.
